top_signals.title: MAX Power secures $18M from Sprott in boost to plans for Canadian hydrogen
top_signals.summary: The energy exploration junior said it has defined the first series of high-priority targets for follow-up drilling at the Lawson natural hydrogen system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
